settings.random_buttons_help: JSON array with label and tag properties. See placeholder for example format.
settings.show_only_used_tags: Show only tags that have discussions
settings.show_tag_count: Show discussion count next to tag names
settings.external_stats_native_url_help: Direct OpenTracker stats URL returning XML. Example: http://IP:6969/stats?mode=everything
settings.external_stats_url_help: URL returning JSON with torrents, seeds, peers, completed, uptime fields
settings.external_stats_refresh_help: How often to refresh external tracker stats. Default: 5 seconds.
settings.custom_links_help: Links shown in Section 1. Each link has a name and a URL; optionally a colour and whether it opens in a new tab.
settings.custom_links_title_help: Optional heading shown above the links (for example: Useful links). Leave empty to hide it.
settings.custom_links_css_help: Optional CSS injected site-wide. Paste your class definitions (and @keyframes) here, then type that class name in a link's CSS class field to style it — for example a glow-on-hover button.
settings.recaptcha_skip_authenticated_help: When enabled, logged-in users are not challenged — reCAPTCHA applies to guests only.
settings.recaptcha_v3_threshold_help: Minimum score (0.0–1.0) accepted for v3. Lower = more permissive. Default: 0.5
settings.recaptcha_on_search: Require reCAPTCHA for Search / Advanced Filters
settings.search_debounce_ms_help: Delay before firing a search while typing. Higher = fewer requests. Default: 500ms
settings.recaptcha_points_enabled_help: Each visitor has a point budget that refills over time, so casual use stays smooth but rapid spamming is stopped. When the budget runs out you can either require a reCAPTCHA or temporarily block the IP (see below) — block mode needs no reCAPTCHA at all.
settings.recaptcha_points_start_help: Initial points given to each visitor. Default: 10
settings.recaptcha_points_refill_seconds_help: How often +N points are added back. Default: 15s
settings.recaptcha_points_refill_amount_help: How many points are added per interval. Default: 1
settings.recaptcha_points_guest_extra_help: Added to every action cost for non-logged-in visitors. Default: +2
settings.recaptcha_points_enforcement_help: What happens when a visitor exhausts their points. "Temporarily block" needs no reCAPTCHA — ideal for pure IP rate-limiting. If reCAPTCHA is not configured, block mode is used automatically.
settings.recaptcha_points_block_seconds_help: How long an IP stays blocked after running out of points (block mode). Points do not refill while blocked. Default: 60s
settings.recaptcha_points_block_reset_help: What the visitor's budget becomes once the IP block expires. "Full" is more forgiving; "empty" keeps them throttled (points then trickle back at the refill rate). During the block points never refill — it always lasts the full duration and is not lifted early.
settings.title_length_help: Title column is varchar(200). Min must be at least 1, max at most 200.
settings.content_length_help: Content column is mediumtext (up to 16 million chars). Set 0 to allow empty posts.
settings.theme_mode_help: Auto detects OS/browser dark mode preference.
settings.category_label_help: Leave empty to use the default translation.
settings.resolution_label_help: Leave empty to use the default translation.

support.title: Support This Extension
support.description: If you find this extension useful, please consider supporting its development with a small donation. Every contribution helps keep the project alive and maintained.

forum.random_not_found: No discussions found in this category.
forum.captcha_description: Complete the challenge below to continue.
forum.rate_limited: Too many actions in a short time. Please try again in {seconds}s.
